description: Act as you in Slack via a personal user token (xoxp-): search all your messages, list and read your DMs and group DMs, read channel history, and post as you.

auth.instructions:
1. Create a private Slack app at https://api.slack.com/apps (From scratch, your workspace).
2. Under OAuth & Permissions, add USER Token Scopes (not Bot Token Scopes):
   search:read, channels:history, groups:history, im:history, mpim:history,
   channels:read, groups:read, im:read, mpim:read, users:read, and chat:write
   (chat:write only if you want it to post as you).
3. Install the app to your workspace and authorize.
4. Copy the User OAuth Token (starts with xoxp-) and paste it here.

required_secrets.name: slack_user_token
required_secrets.prompt: Slack User OAuth Token (starts with xoxp-, from api.slack.com/apps > OAuth & Permissions)
